hero.title: Packers & Movers in Gujarat
hero.subtitle: Ahmedabad to Surat, Vadodara to Rajkot — 9,570+ verified movers across 27 cities in Gujarat.

intro:
Gujarat's rapid industrial growth and thriving trade hubs make it one of India's most active relocation markets. Radhe packers and movers connects you with 9,570+ verified packers and movers across Ahmedabad, Surat, Vadodara, Rajkot, Gandhinagar, Bhavnagar, Bhuj and 21 more cities.

Whether you're moving your family from Surat's textile district or relocating your business from GIFT City in Gandhinagar, our KYC-verified vendors know Gujarat's highways, industrial corridors and residential complexes inside out.
whyUs: Gujarat's expressways and diamond city corridors call for movers who understand high-value cargo, narrow old-city lanes in Ahmedabad's heritage pols, and the logistics of long cross-state moves on NH-48. Our vendors deliver ₹5 lakh damage protection, GPS tracking and pay-after-delivery across every district.

faqs.q: How much do packers and movers cost in Gujarat?
faqs.a: Local 1 BHK moves within Gujarat cities start at ₹3,500. A 2 BHK inter-city move (e.g., Ahmedabad to Surat) typically costs ₹8,000–₹14,000 depending on distance and packing requirements.

faqs.q: Which cities in Gujarat does Radhe packers and movers cover?
faqs.a: We cover all 27 major cities including Ahmedabad, Surat, Vadodara, Rajkot, Gandhinagar, Bhavnagar, Jamnagar, Bhuj, Junagadh, Anand, Nadiad and more.

faqs.q: Can you handle moves during Gujarat's extreme summer heat?
faqs.a: Yes. Our vendors schedule moves for early morning slots and use heat-protective packing materials for electronics, artwork and temperature-sensitive items during peak summer.

faqs.q: Do you move goods between Gujarat and other states?
faqs.a: Absolutely. We handle inter-state moves from Gujarat to Maharashtra, Rajasthan, Madhya Pradesh and all major Indian destinations with full insurance coverage.
